title: Frontend perf marks around library load, filter, sort, virtualized render, audio load
description: Sprinkle _perf.mark/measure around the hot frontend paths so we can profile in real sessions by setting localStorage.autocue_perf=1.
acceptanceCriteria: Marks around: loadTracksFromServer (library load); filteredTracks recompute; sort change; Virtualizer.render; audio.play setup in mini player.
Each measure logs under [AutoCue Perf] with a descriptive name and duration.
Vitest test verifies marks fire when localStorage flag set.
Verified in browser using playwright: enable flag, load app, assert console.log lines appear with expected names.

steps.details: Inside the debounced rIC callback (TASK-036): _perf.mark('filter-start'); const indices = filteredTracks(); _perf.measure('filter-recompute', 'filter-start');
On sort key change, before re-applying filteredTracks: _perf.mark('sort-start'); ... _perf.measure('sort', 'sort-start');
Mini player audio setup: _perf.mark('audio-load-start'); audio.src = ...; await audio.canplay; _perf.measure('audio-load', 'audio-load-start');
tests/web/ui-logic.test.js: stub performance.mark; set localStorage.autocue_perf=1; trigger each marked path; assert mark called with expected names.
tests/e2e/qa-smoke.spec.ts: page.evaluate(() => localStorage.setItem('autocue_perf','1')); reload; intercept console.log; assert [AutoCue Perf] library-load, filter-recompute, vrender lines appear.

technicalNotes: Don't mark inside the hot inner loops (per-card render) - measure the whole render pass, not each call to renderItem.
Mark names should be terse - they're console-logged in real time when enabled.
